headline: A promising actuator claim is relevant but not decision-ready
summary: Nova Motion reports a compact actuator that may satisfy Project Ember's peak-torque requirement. The claim is vendor supplied and omits a comparable duty-cycle test.
changes: A new actuator is claimed to deliver 120 Nm peak torque at 24 V.
unchanged: Independent evidence remains required before changing the prototype decision.
The twelve-minute duty-cycle requirement remains unresolved.

Organization.name: Nova Motion
Organization.description: Synthetic actuator supplier used by the demonstration.

Observation.statement_text: Nova Motion reports that its compact actuator delivers 120 Nm peak torque at 24 V.
Observation.test_context: Supplier bench specification; duty cycle not reported.

Evidence.excerpt: Peak torque: 120 Nm at 24 V. Continuous duty-cycle performance not specified.
